overwhelm/move/huge/fast/stay/set.def: (使)壓倒、(使)淹沒、(使)受打擊的人的人 (倒/壓/沒/淹/擊/打/覆/蓋)

owe/move/huge/bad/fast/stay/set.ex: I owe you a drink tonight, sir.
